CreateL2BucketLink.action: Fixed value for this API: CreateL2BucketLink
CreateL2BucketLink.conflictPolicy:
Conflict policy
  • 1 Overwrite
  • 2 Skip
  • 3 Keep both
CreateL2BucketLink.bucketName: BOS bucket name for the data transfer task, max length 64
CreateL2BucketLink.bucketPrefix:
BOS bucket prefix for the data transfer task. Requirements:
  • Must not start with "/"
  • Must end with "/"
  • Max length 1000
  • Path does not support "." or ".."
CreateL2BucketLink.throughputLimitBytes:
Throughput limit for the data transfer task, in bytes. Only three tiers are supported: 600MB, 1200MB, 1500MB, i.e.:
  • 629145600
  • 1258291200
  • 1572864000
CreateL2BucketLink.reportObjectName:
Object name for saving the data transfer report.
  • Max length 978
  • Path does not support "." or ".."
CreateL2BucketLink.bucketLinkName: Name of the data transfer task, max length 128 (64 for Chinese characters)
CreateL2BucketLink.transferType:
Type of data transfer task
  • 0 Export (PFS -> BOS)
  • 1 Import (BOS -> PFS)
CreateL2BucketLink.pfsPath:
PFS path for the data transfer task. Requirements:
  • Must start with "/"
  • Must not end with "/"
  • Max length 1000
  • Path does not support "." or ".."
CreateL2BucketLink.cron:
Indicates whether this is a periodic data transfer task. Omit this field for one-time tasks; provide a recurrence rule for periodic tasks. The cron field uses a crontab-like syntax, supporting only \* and numbers: \* \* \* \* \* corresponds to minute hour day month weekday. Examples:
0 0 \* \* \* Run once daily at 00:00
0 0 1 \* \* Run on the 1st of every month at 00:00
0 0 \* \* 1 Run every Monday at 00:00
Note: Only the following schedule expressions are supported: a specific time each day, a specific day and time each month, or a specific weekday and time each week. Other expressions will be rejected.
CreateL2BucketLink.bucketBelongUserId: Cross-account field specifying the primary account user ID of the target account
CreateL2BucketLink.lccId: When cross-account access is enabled, if the bucket belongs to an LCC zone, the LCC ID of the bucket must also be specified
CreateL2BucketLink.scope: Visibility scope of the task. 1: visible to both primary account and all sub-accounts; 2: visible to primary account and associated sub-accounts only
